rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER XUE VS. HIGHFIELD HOSPITALITY INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Set for Discovery on Thursday, December 26, 2024 Line 2, PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER XUE's Motion To Deem Facts Admitted. Continued to January 23, 2025. Per SF Local Rule 2.7B, the moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of his filings immediately with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. =(301/JMQ)
